positive: A highly detailed symmetrical mystical forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a graceful, stylized deer stag standing in a clearing, illuminated by glowing ethereal mushrooms and trailing vines. The composition should be centralized and balanced, utilizing deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with high-contrast black silhouettes of foliage. Use a vibrant, stylized engraving style mixed with modern digital painting, ensuring strong, defined edges and perfect symmetry. The overall mood should be magical and serene. Ideal for a repeating apparel pattern or a central graphic print. Cinematic, volumetric lighting, ultra-fine detail.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, watermark, text, signatures, logos, cropped, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, out of frame, messy, ugly
